raw_consumer_statement: Barclays Bank knows about ongoing fraud and criminal scam operations via XXXX XXXX XXXX where they are actively promoting that victims apply for the Barclays RCI credit card to finance their fraudulent purchase. The amount of {$12000.00} was disputed with Barclays from XXXX XXXX, a sell of organized crime in XXXX XXXX XXXX. Barclays has been informed of this fraudulent merchant since at least XXXX and done nothing adequate, failing to protect innocent consumers. The office of the president confirmed on a recorded line that they acknowledge this is a fraudulent merchant. On two occasions I have received two unauthorized actions on my account. They claim the case was closed by my request, which I never did. They also claimed at one point via letter that I called them and validated the charge, which also never occured.I believe this alleged misrepresentations may violate fair banking practices and I am entitled to good faith and fair dealing where they honor their confirmations. This merchant was reported for both fraud and disputed as they have provided zero service or goods in exchange for this large sum of funds. Barclays has been indicted for a similar scam and continues to remain complicent, allowing criminal organizations to promote the application and use of their credit cards to funds the scam.
